title: astragalus absentivus
intro: Astragalus absentivus, also known as Astragalus membranaceus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to China and other parts of Asia. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus absentivus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tablets, tea, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
